name: Beach Boxing Simulator
author: Poki
description: Beach Boxing Simulator is a training game set on a sunny beach where you can build the ultimate fighter! Work out with different equipment to train your arms, legs, core, and back. The harder you train, the stronger you get. Once you’re pumped up, step into the boxing ring and test your skills against other players. Ready to train, fight, and become the beach champ? How to play Beach Boxing Simulator? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Beach Boxing Simulator? Beach Boxing Simulator is created by Bun Muen. Play their other games on Poki: Swole Simulator ! How can I play Beach Boxing Simulator for free? You can play Beach Boxing Simulator for free on Poki. Can I play Beach Boxing Simulator on mobile devices and desktop? Beach Boxing Simulator can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
